items.title: SEC Proposes Rescission of Regulation NMS Rules 611 and 610(e)
items.raw_excerpt: The Securities and Exchange Commission today proposed amendments to rescind Rules 611 and 610(e) of Regulation NMS.“After two decades of Rule 611, it is high time that the Commission review its unintended consequences that have hindered — rather than…
